alerts.source: Payless Liquors East Street barrel selections
alerts.inventorySemantics: Indiana is a private retail market. ATC permit rows identify active package-store locations but are not bottle inventory. Retailer shop endpoints/pages such as CityHive can produce store-level bottle inventory/watch signals, with a verify-before-driving caveat.
alerts.reason: New store_level retailer_store_inventory_result signal for Bulleit Bourbon in IN.
alerts.evidence: Payless Liquors says Bulleit Single Barrel is available at the East Street location in Indianapolis on its barrel selections page.
